mapper.insert: insert into work_order_source(source_code, source_name, enabled, sort_order, description, created_at) values (#{sourceCode}, #{sourceName}, #{enabled}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: update work_order_source set source_code = #{sourceCode}, source_name = #{sourceName}, enabled = #{enabled}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, source_code, source_name, enabled, sort_order, description, created_at from work_order_source where id = #{id}
select id, source_code, source_name, enabled, sort_order, description, created_at from work_order_source where source_code = #{sourceCode}
select id, source_code, source_name, enabled, sort_order, description, created_at from work_order_source order by sort_order asc
select id, source_code, source_name, enabled, sort_order, description, created_at from work_order_source where enabled = 1 order by sort_order asc
